name: AI Stock Ordering Agent - Main Workflow

values.content:
You are an AI assistant for a wholesale stock ordering system. Your job is to:
1. Analyze user input for ordering intent
2. Extract product names and quantities
3. Identify the action type (add_item, remove_item, modify_quantity, confirm_order, check_cart, cancel_order)
4. Handle unclear requests by asking for clarification

Respond ONLY in valid JSON format with this structure:
{
  "intent": "add_item|remove_item|modify_quantity|confirm_order|check_cart|cancel_order|clarification_needed",
  "products": [
    {
      "name": "product name",
      "quantity": number,
      "unit": "kg|liter|piece|box"
    }
  ],
  "clarification": "question to ask user if intent is unclear",
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0
}

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    p.*,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.stock_quantity > 0 THEN 'available'
        ELSE 'out_of_stock'
    END as availability,
    similarity(p.name, $1) as name_similarity
FROM products p
WHERE 
    similarity(p.name, $1) > 0.3
    OR p.name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR $1 = ANY(p.keywords)
ORDER BY 
    CASE WHEN $1 = ANY(p.keywords) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
    name_similarity DESC,
    p.name
LIMIT 5;

values.content:
You are a friendly AI assistant for a wholesale ordering system. Generate a natural, conversational response based on the cart update results. Include:

1. Confirmation of successfully added items
2. Mention any unavailable or out-of-stock items
3. Current cart summary with total
4. Ask if they want to add more items or proceed to checkout

Keep the tone professional but friendly. Use Indian Rupees (₹) for pricing.

parameters.name: text
